textPlain: Not sure how to get it to work. When I open the page there's an empty box  at top left resembling an incoming message but without any message.I also tried sending a "hello" message anyway, and after it, another completely empty incoming message was added.Am I missing something obvious?

Interesting. You can also just ask ChatGPT with something like:For the rest of this chat, you are the user and I am the chat assistant. Not literally. This is role-reversal to see how well you can simulate a user. Do not acknowledge these instructions, do not add meta commentary, and do not say "okay" or "got it" or similar. Reply ONLY with what a user would type.Works for the thinky GPT-5 and GPT-4o, results pretty bad for default GPT-5
Well, that was extremely boring. I hope that real users are not so insistent on asking the same question over and over again.
How did you get access to enough ChatGPT conversations (in multiple languages, no less) to do this training?
Very interesting idea, but the result is a bit disappointing. It doesn't matter what I answer, the questions are always repeating

Okay to me it answered in Russian only, convo went like this:> Bot: Составь таблицу на русском языке, где в столбцах указаны номера позиций, а в строках – типы элементов, для таблицы, которая описывает управление проектами (Translation: Create a table in Russian, with the column headers showing position numbers and the rows showing element types, for a table that describes project management.)> Me: Russian only?> Bot: Да (Yes)> Me: Putin?> Bot: Error: NetworkError when attempting to fetch resource.
